0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Data Privacy"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's privacy-first design ensures your data stays under your control."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Privacy Principles"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Data minimization"}],": Only store what's necessary"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Local processing"}],": No cloud required"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"User control"}],": Full export and deletion capabilities"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transparency"}],": All operations are inspectable"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Data Flow"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  U[User Input] -->|Local| M[Mnemosyne]\n  M -->|Optional| O[OpenAI Embeddings]\n  M -->|Local| DB[(SQLite)]\n  \n  style M fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#0284c7\n  style DB fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Minimizing External Calls"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Strategy | Implementation |\n|----------|---------------|\n| Local embeddings | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"local_embeddings=True"}]," |\n| No telemetry | No analytics or tracking |\n| Optional cloud | Cloud features are opt-in |\n| Self-hosted | Run entirely on your infrastructure |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"GDPR Compliance"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Right to Access"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Export all data about a user\nmem.export_user_data(user_id=\"user_123\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Right to Erasure"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Delete all memories related to a user\nmem.forget_all(tags=[\"user_123\"])\nmem.delete_user_data(user_id=\"user_123\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Data Portability"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Export in standard formats\nmem.export(format=\"json\")   # Machine-readable\nmem.export(format=\"csv\")    # Spreadsheet-friendly\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"PII Handling"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne does not automatically detect or redact PII. Best practices:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Tag PII-containing memories: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tags=[\"pii\"]"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Use encryption for sensitive data"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Implement retention policies for PII"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Audit access to PII-tagged memories"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Privacy by Default"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["With ",["$","code",null,{"children":"local_embeddings=True"}]," and no cloud features enabled, Mnemosyne operates entirely offline. No data ever leaves your machine."]}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0ch_p3vkb0uw2.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/113wy2s~ukj5p.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0se1rt9lzyib_.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0e1gsufr5shdc.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-8",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/13n60-fppanm4.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-9",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0g~f0923b0wjv.js","async":true}]],["$","$L5",null,{"children":["$","$6",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@7"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}
